author: TechCrunch
notes: Local file is a square head crop of this TechCrunch Disrupt SF 2017 photo (matched on earpiece mic, necklace pendants, and DISRUPT signage fragments). Original on TechCrunch's Flickr: https://www.flickr.com/photos/techcrunch/36938473750/

author: World Economic Forum
notes: Local file is a square head crop of this Davos 2013 photo from the World Economic Forum Flickr stream (verified against full-resolution head crop: identical expression, pinstripe suit, and FORUM backdrop lettering).

author: Bogdan Hoyaux / European Union
notes: Previous local image was a TV/video interview screengrab with no traceable free license, so it was replaced. New image is the June 2025 European Commission visit portrait (current English Wikipedia lead image), center-cropped square and resized to 460x460. EC source: https://audiovisual.ec.europa.eu/en/photo/P-067383~2F00-01

author: The Centre for Effective Altruism
notes: Local file is a square head crop of this still from the EA Global 2016 talk video (verified frame-identical against the full-resolution Commons PNG).

author: Secretaría de Cultura Ciudad de México
notes: Matches the hint from the previous agent: December 2018 photo from the Secretaría de Cultura CDMX Flickr stream (https://www.flickr.com/photos/culturacdmx/45680472234). Local file is a tighter square crop.

author: Tony Barnard, Los Angeles Times
notes: 1973 Los Angeles Times photo (UCLA Library digital collection, https://digital.library.ucla.edu/catalog/ark:/21198/zz0002p863). Local file is a square crop of the Commons image.

author: Moskov (Dustin Moskovitz, Commons uploader; sister upload's EXIF credits photographer Bart Nagel, 2011)
notes: Local file is a square crop of this 2011 headshot, released CC BY-SA 3.0 on Commons as own work by the subject's account (used as his Wikipedia photo).
